creator: stephane+freebsd@bortzmeyer.org
text:
Indeed, the file has the wrong size:

verite:Target/X86/Disassembler % wc ../X86GenDisassemblerTables.inc
 1700671 4465268 31817728 ../X86GenDisassemblerTables.inc

And is truncated:

% tail ../X86GenDisassemblerTables.inc

     MODRM_ONEENTRY,
     0 /* EmptyTable */
    },
    /* 0x43 */
    { /* ModRMDecision */
     MODRM_ONEENTRY,
     0 /* EmptyTable */
    },
    /* 0x44 */
    { /* ModRMDeverite:Target/X86/Disassembler % 
verite:Target/X86/Disassembler %
